name: Yandex Search MCP Server
what_it_does: Yandex Search MCP server enabling AI agents to perform web searches via Yandex — Russia's dominant search engine — querying Yandex's search index for Russian-language and CIS-region content, retrieving search results, and integrating Yandex search into agent-driven research workflows for Russian-language information retrieval.
use_cases: Searching Russian-language web content from CIS-region research agents
Accessing Yandex search results for Eastern European content from market research agents
Retrieving Russian news and information from monitoring agents
Building multilingual search workflows covering Russian internet (Runet)
Researching CIS markets with Yandex's deep Russian-language index
Complementing Google searches with Yandex for Russian-origin content
not_for: English-language focused search (Google/Brave better for English content)
Teams with legal/compliance restrictions on Russian services
Organizations subject to sanctions that restrict Yandex usage
best_when: An agent needs to search Russian-language content or research the CIS market — Yandex has superior coverage of Russian internet compared to Google for Russian queries.
avoid_when: You primarily search English-language content, or have compliance concerns about Yandex's Russian jurisdiction.

auth.notes: Yandex Search API key required. Obtain from Yandex.XML service. Free tier available with limited daily queries. Russian Yandex account required.

pricing.notes: Yandex.XML has a generous free tier. Russian account required. Community MCP is free open source.

known_agent_gotchas: Yandex account required — Russian phone number may be needed for registration
Data residency in Russia — subject to Russian data regulations
Yandex.XML API documentation primarily in Russian
Sanctions compliance: verify Yandex usage is permitted in your jurisdiction
Community MCP from individual contributor — Yandex API is moderately documented
Result format differs from Google — parse response carefully
agent_readiness.security_notes: API key auth. HTTPS. Russian data jurisdiction — verify compliance. Store API key in env var. Community MCP. Sanctions review recommended for non-CIS users.

security_score_components.security_notes: API key. HTTPS. Russian data jurisdiction. Sanctions compliance review. Community MCP. Store key in env var.
